results.rationale_brief: Specific dental implant detail with expert counter-view and micron-level data; comparative framing matches.
Business rationale listed but somewhat one-sided; reasoning is light comparison rather than deep analysis.
Clear surgical comparison ACDF vs corpectomy with technical accuracy; well-calibrated as hard comparative.
Analogy-based reasoning but speculative; comparison is more rhetorical than analytic.
Structured comparison across 4 dimensions but fact-listing rather than reasoning; better suited as 'medium'.
Before/after comparison enumerates items without causal analysis; partial answer ('부분 전략 수립').
Brain-kidney axis with multi-pathway mechanism (autoregulation, catecholamine, inflammation, nephrotoxin); deep clinical reasoning.
Clear role distinction at conceptual level; somewhat surface-level for technical security/payments domain.
Generic lifestyle advice; labeled 'hard comparative' but content is basic recommendation listing.
Comprehensive law enumeration by category; fact-listing rather than comparison despite label.
Distinguishes surgical vs radiation sequelae with progression detail; appropriate clinical depth.
Case-level comparison but slightly anecdotal; comparative framing supported but shallow analysis.
Two approaches contrasted with rationale (free-ending case); technically specific dental detail.
Three concrete legal-procedural failure modes with reasoning; well-fit as hard explanatory.
Causal explanation with analogy (gym/exercise); good synthesis on edtech balance.
Smart contract mechanism contrasted with escrow fee model; concrete numeric examples.
Causal account of T2DM natural history with insulin secretion as bottleneck; coherent endocrinology reasoning.
Anatomical safety rationale (bony vs pleural target) accurate; concise comparative.
Plane-block vs nerve-targeted block distinction technically correct with diffusion mechanism.
Multi-stage virtuous cycle with data→solution→investment→data loop; coherent ecosystem logic.
Asserts no fundamental difference but gives only SEC/KRX framing; shallow for hard-labeled.
Duplicate of q080 content; same enumeration, fact-listing rather than true comparison.
Four specific surgical considerations (full vs half thickness, Müller, overcorrection, timing); explanatory depth appropriate.
Brief abstract contrast luck/engineering; very short and generic for hard comparative.
Quantitative GFR change with treatment-class drivers (ACEi/ARB, SGLT2, GLP-1); good temporal comparison.
